pattern_hint: will grow|expects to|projects|forecasts|targets|expects revenue|anticipates|aims to achieve|planned to|expected to|budgeted for
suggested_rewrite_hint: Add after statement: '(Subject to market conditions and regulatory approvals)'

description: Price-sensitive information must not be disclosed before official exchange filing
pattern_hint: likely to announce|expected to report|sources say|insider sources|unconfirmed reports|reliably learn|we understand|is likely to
suggested_rewrite_hint: Attribute exclusively to official BSE/NSE filings or company disclosures. Remove unattributed claims. Use 'According to regulatory filings' or 'As per stock exchange disclosure'.

description: Analyst recommendations must disclose conflicts of interest
suggested_rewrite_hint: Add analyst name and firm affiliation: '[Analyst Name, XYZ Securities]. [Publication] holds no position in this stock.' Or cite research report formally.

description: Stock price manipulation language prohibited - no language inducing trading behavior
pattern_hint: guaranteed returns|assured gains|can't lose|sure bet|double your money|certain profits|risk-free|foolproof|gold mine|unmissable opportunity
suggested_rewrite_hint: Replace with factual price history. Example: 'The stock has gained 45% YoY' instead of 'investors are guaranteed to profit'. Use neutral tone and cite historical data.

description: Insider trading references must include appropriate disclaimers and attribution
pattern_hint: insider buying|insider selling|promoter bought|promoter sold|bulk deal|shareholding pattern|promoter stake|stake increase
suggested_rewrite_hint: Cite official BSE/NSE bulk deal disclosures or shareholding pattern data. Example: 'According to bulk deal data on BSE, [Name] bought X shares at ₹Y.' Include filing reference.
